title: Sybase Configuration Parameters
text: Sybase Configuration Parameters The Sybase configuration parameter send doneinproc tokens must be set to 1. The default value is 1, but when the value has been changed to 0 (to gain performance), it is not possible to use the Uniface stored procedures for Sybase. To set the setting to 1, enter: sp_configure 'donein', 1 go Copy To check all Sybase configuration settings, enter: sp_configure go Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
